meanings.definition: an act that makes a previous act of no effect (as if not done)
loosening the ties that fasten something
examples: the tying of bow ties is an art; the untying is easy

meanings.definition: cancel, annul, or reverse an action or its effect
examples: I wish I could undo my actions

meanings.definition: cause the ruin or downfall of
examples: A single mistake undid the President and he had to resign

meanings.definition: remove the outer cover or wrapping of
